# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Pedigree, §Purl on patched components
# Covers: ancestors, patches with inline diff loaded from disk, resolves, notes.

mkdir patches
mv overflow.patch patches/overflow.patch

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o out.json

# --- Ancestors ---
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.ancestors[0].purl == "pkg:github/DaveGamble/cJSON@1.7.17"' out.json

# --- Patches: type, resolves, inline diff text from file ---
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.patches[0].type == "backport"' out.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.patches[0].resolves[0].name == "CVE-2024-XXXXX"' out.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.patches[0].resolves[0].type == "security"' out.json
# diff.text should be loaded from patches/overflow.patch
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.patches[0].diff.text.content | test("this is a fake diff")' out.json

# Notes round-trip
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.notes | test("Forked at commit")' out.json

# Commits
exec jq -e '.components[0].pedigree.commits[0].uid == "abc123"' out.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    {
      "name": "cjson",
      "version": "1.7.17",
      "type": "library",
      "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": { "name": "Acme (patched fork)" },
      "purl": "pkg:github/acme/device-firmware/src/cjson@1.7.17",
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{ "algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa" }],
      "pedigree": {
        "ancestors": [
          { "purl": "pkg:github/DaveGamble/cJSON@1.7.17" }
        ],
        "commits": [
          { "uid": "abc123", "url": "https://github.com/acme/device-firmware/commit/abc123" }
        ],
        "patches": [
          {
            "type": "backport",
            "diff": { "url": "./patches/overflow.patch" },
            "resolves": [
              { "type": "security", "name": "CVE-2024-XXXXX", "url": "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-XXXXX" }
            ]
          }
        ],
        "notes": "Forked at commit abc123; local fix for int overflow in parser."
      }
    }
  ]
}
-- overflow.patch --
--- a/cJSON.c
+++ b/cJSON.c
this is a fake diff body for testing
